# UserRoundSearch

## Tags
person, account, contact, find, scan, magnifier, magnifying glass, lens

## Categories
account, social

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/user-round-search)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::UserRoundSearch;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        UserRoundSearch { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
